message.content:
@startuml
title RqP – Request Resource

actor "Requesting Party\n(RqP)" as rq_p

package "Client Application (CA)\n«Custom Application»" {
    rectangle UserInterface [User Interface]
}

rectangle ContentServer <<Application>> CS #lightblue{
  REST_API_CS :REST API;
  Data_DB [(Data)] -- REST_API_CS 
}


participant RS_RESTAPI<<interface>> in "Resource Server (RS)\\n « Custom Application »"{
   participant resource_db[(resource)]  
   participant credential_db[(credential)]   
 } 

database AM_API#orange["AM API"] 


node AS_UMA_OAUTH ["Authorization Server(AS) \\ ForgeRock Access Manager "]as auth_server{    
     node UMA_API[UMA API ]     
      node OAuth2_API[OAuth API]      
       note right of UA_Authentication:"Validate SSO session";       
        activate UMATicketValidation        
         deactivate UMATicketValidation         
          return NoAccessSubmitted          
           end group           
            else               
             if CheckPolicy then                
              create new_policy              
               link policy_creation --> check_access             
                loop until approved                 
                 wait_for_approval                  
                  display WaitingForApproval                   
                   break                    
                    exit                     
                     endif                      
                      elseif denied                        
                       reject_request                       
                        terminate                         
                         endif                          
                          finally                            
                           cleanup_resources                           
                            close_connection                             
                             finalize_transaction                              
                              log_event                                
                               notify_administrator                                 
                                send_notification_to_user                                   
                                     update_audit_log                                     
                                          generate_report                                       
                                             archive_data                                          
                                              backup_system                                           
                                               restore_from_backup                                            
                                                monitor_performance                                                 
                                                  optimize_database                                                   
                                                   scale_infrastructure                                                     
                                                        deploy_updates                                                          
                                                             rollback_changes                                                             
                                                                  test_functionality                                                               
                                                                     validate_security                                                                       security_scan                                                                                penetration_testing                                                                                    compliance_check                                                                                         risk_assessment                                                                                            incident_response
